title: Rostellaria quinqueangularis
taxonomy: Rostellaria quinqueangularis is a species of extinct sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family of Rostellariidae, a family of large, deep-water snails. The classification of Rostellaria quinqueangularis includes the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Rostellariida. Its classification is based on the anatomical and morphological features of the shell and internal structures. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this extinct species.
